FinalOptimzationSHOWTHISFIRSTWITHANOTE.p.title: OUTRUN Lobby Overview
FinalOptimzationSHOWTHISFIRSTWITHANOTE.p.description: Main lobby interior I modeled for OUTRUN. Optimized to ~160k tris.

imag9.png.title: OUTRUN Lobby Dome View
imag9.png.description: Another angle of the OUTRUN lobby with dome structures and rock field.

image1.png.title: OUTRUN Lobby Exterior
image1.png.description: Wide exterior view of the OUTRUN lobby and surrounding rocks.

image2.png.title: OUTRUN Lobby Window View
image2.png.description: Interior viewport looking out at the lobby rock formations.

image3.png.title: OUTRUN Train & Shop Area
image3.png.description: Lobby zone with Train archway, shop counters, and planter details.

image4.png.title: OUTRUN Abilities Plaza
image4.png.description: Central plaza with Abilities, Cosmetics, and trophy display areas.

image5.png.title: OUTRUN Duels Arena
image5.png.description: Symmetrical duel room with skylight, crystal ceiling, and 1v1/2v2 signs.

image6.png.title: OUTRUN Matchmaking Area
image6.png.description: Duels gateway with 1v1, 2v2 zones, and a Daily Rewards station.

image7.png.title: OUTRUN Gateway Entrance
image7.png.description: Main entrance arch with OUTRUN signage, pipes, and crystal trim.

image8.png.title: OUTRUN Spawn Platform
image8.png.description: Circular spawn pad with hologram displays and cavern walls.

image10.png.title: OUTRUN Leaderboards
image10.png.description: Leaderboard room with monitor rig, cables, and a central display platform.
